object_a.label: cabinet
object_a.long_form_open_description: Continuous white baseboard molding running along the bottom of the walls; about 4–6 inches tall with a simple profile. Visible left to right, framing the hardwood floor and showing minor scuffs near the doorway bottom.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: runs beneath the thermostat, light switches, and outlets; outlines doorway base
